Thanks for contributing to HydraMem! Please fill out this template so reviewers
have the context they need.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Motivation / linked issue

Closes #...

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] If this PR used an AI agent, it followed [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
- [ ] Tests added or updated (`uv run pytest` is green locally).
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` is clean.
- [ ] Public APIs / configuration keys are documented in `docs/`.
- [ ] If this changes telemetry, the schema bump is recorded in `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] If this affects honesty / metrics, the impact is documented.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual? Trade-offs, follow-up tasks, screenshots, benchmarks. -->
